citations.desc: Attending veterinarian and adequate veterinary care (dealers and exhibitors).
citations.narrative:
The facility is medicating an adult fox with trazodone that is expired. There are two visible expiration dates on the bottle:
August 8, 2025, and September, 2025.
Expired medications may have health effects on the animal such as reduced efficacy. This can impede the facility from
appropriately preventing, controlling, or treating diseases.
The facility took measures to correct this at the time of inspection. Continue to correct from this day forward (February 18,
2026) by ensuring that all administered medications are not expired in order to appropriately prevent, control, and treat
diseases.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with a facility representative.
n

narrative:
2.40(b)(2) 
   
Attending veterinarian and adequate veterinary care (dealers and exhibitors). 
The facility is medicating an adult fox with trazodone that is expired. There are two visible expiration dates on the bottle: 
August 8, 2025, and September, 2025.  
 
Expired medications may have health effects on the animal such as reduced efficacy. This can impede the facility from 
appropriately preventing, controlling, or treating diseases.  
 
The facility took measures to correct this at the time of inspection. Continue to correct from this day forward (February 18, 
2026) by ensuring that all administered medications are not expired in order to appropriately prevent, control, and treat 
diseases. 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with a facility representative.
